title: myrica esculenta var. farquhariana
intro: Myrica esculenta var. farquhariana, also known as the Bayur tree or Farquhar's bayur, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the family Myricaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Myrica esculenta var. farquhariana include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
